title: Bountiful Blocks
description: Expands on Minecraft's blocksets in a vanilla-like manner
body:
Enhance your builds with various new blocks expanding on Minecraft's existing blocksets !

Adds over 520 new unique blocks along with stairs, slab and walls variations while remaining faithful to the game's art style.

Also adds 1200+ recipes to help you easily switch from one block type to another within a single blockset using the stonecutter.
